## Real use case

<!-- Describe a concrete situation where you actually hit this limitation today.
     "I was doing X and needed Y but couldn't because Z."
     Speculative ("it would be nice if…") or hypothetical use cases will be closed. -->

## Current workaround

<!-- How are you solving this today, if at all? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like the tool or behavior to look like?
     Keep it minimal — describe the smallest change that solves YOUR case. -->

## Why this belongs in mcp-memory

<!-- mcp-memory does one thing: semantic text memory via MCP, small and well-made.
     Explain why this feature fits that scope and doesn't require maintaining
     something that only benefits edge cases. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why don't they work for you? -->

---

> We build on demand, not on speculation.
> If there is no real use case documented here, the issue will be closed.
>
> Issues in Spanish are welcome too. / Los issues en español también son bienvenidos.
